issues.title: Test Auth Context Fails Due to Rate Limiting
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Run Playwright tests with multiple test accounts
2. Tests attempt to sign up/sign in users
3. Rate limiter blocks requests with 429 status
issues.expected_result: Tests should be able to create and authenticate test users
issues.actual_result: Rate limiter blocks test signup/signin requests
issues.root_cause: Rate limiter doesn't detect test mode at server runtime
issues.fix_implemented: Added test mode detection with global flag and test-utils API endpoint

issues.title: Optimistic Locking Version Field Missing
issues.expected_result: Concurrent updates should be detected with 409 Conflict
issues.root_cause: No version field in database schema for optimistic locking
issues.fix_implemented: Added version field to User, UserProfile, UserSettings models

issues.title: Missing Audit Logging on Profile Updates
issues.expected_result: All profile updates logged with user context
issues.root_cause: Audit logging utility not integrated into profile API
issues.fix_implemented: Added comprehensive audit logging to profile GET and PUT handlers
verification_steps: Check server logs for audit entries

issues.title: E2E Test Selectors Not Matching Page Structure
issues.expected_result: Tests should correctly identify page elements
issues.actual_result: CSS selectors don't match actual page structure
issues.root_cause: Test selectors not updated to match actual component IDs
issues.fix_implemented: Updated selectors to use flexible matching

issues.title: Rate Limiting Already Implemented
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Check auth endpoints for rate limiting
2. Verify rate limit headers in responses
issues.root_cause: No issue - rate limiting already in place
issues.fix_implemented: Added test mode bypass for testing
verification_steps: Tests run without rate limit issues

issues.title: Audit Logging Already Implemented
issues.actual_result: Utility exists but not integrated into all routes

issues.title: Test Account Creation Needs Retry Logic
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Accounts already exist from previous run
3. Signup fails but signin should work
issues.expected_result: Test setup should handle existing accounts gracefully
issues.root_cause: No fallback to signin when signup fails with 'already exists'
issues.fix_implemented: Added retry logic with signin fallback
